title: Poached Paleo Slovakian Egg Frittata
description: A dense and jammy Slovakian dish featuring poached eggs and peanut oil, perfect for a paleo-friendly brunch
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large skillet, heat the peanut oil over medium heat
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes
Add the fresh spinach and cook until wilted, about 1 minute
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, salt, black pepper, and paprika
Pour the egg mixture over the cooked vegetables in the skillet
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes
While the frittata is baking, poach the eggs in a separate pot of simmering water
Remove the frittata from the oven and top with the poached eggs
